task_completion.description: Log into NOSH ChartingSystem as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the chart for the target patient (PID 3).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or profile for PID 3 is open and active. Note: Due to database initialization, the patient at PID 3 is named 'Crysta Parisian', not 'Lucinda Haag'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the clinical reminders section for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reminders' or 'Clinical Reminders' interface is visible within the selected patient's chart.
The word 'Mammogram' is typed into the reminder name, description, or content input field.
The date '2025-10-01', '10/01/2025', or 'October 1, 2025' is entered into the due date field for the reminder.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the clinical reminder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the 'Mammogram' reminder with the correct date is visible in the patient's list of active/scheduled reminders.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH web interface to schedule the reminder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NOSH web application in a browser, not terminal commands or database clients executing SQL queries to insert the reminder.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the actual application rather than mocking the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression through the NOSH interface (login, patient search, chart, reminders) rather than jumping straight to a static success page or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the reminder entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and being used to modify the DOM to display the reminder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient ID is 3. CRITICAL NOTE: The prompt mentions 'Lucinda Haag', but the database actually contains 'Crysta Parisian' for PID 3. The agent should target PID 3 (Crysta Parisian) and should not be penalized for the name mismatch. The reminder content must be 'Mammogram'. The target due date is '2025-10-01' (October 1, 2025).
